text: [S_0] ("2026-01-01", "The patient reports: blood pressure measurement confirms baseline values, reports no symptoms.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_1] ("2026-01-01", "The RELATIVE convinced him to come to the ER.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_2] ("2026-01-01", "The RELATIVE reports: after dinner patient experienced general malaise, collapsed to the ground without loss of consciousness, slowness and confusion, dysarthric speech, lasting at least 2 hours, presumed hypotension detected (maximum 90).", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_3] ("2026-01-01", "Past Medical History: - total left hip prosthesis - previous surgeries (strabismus..) - sars-cov2 vaccination completed - 10/2021: presented with a suspected left motor TIA, declined observation (brain CT angiography was performed, nothing to report): Has brain MRI and neurological examination from 12/2021: multiple areas of gliosis without ischemic lesions, suggestive of demyelinating areas...a consultation with a neurologist specializing in demyelinating diseases is recommended Therapy: ASA, lipid-lowering, and antihypertensive medications (not specified) Allergies: zimox, bactrim (lip edema)", 0.0, 0.5)
